description: §6.13.5 E-REACTIVITY-ATTR-CONFLICT — a state cell carrying BOTH `debounced=` AND `throttled=` describes competing timing rules and is forbidden. `<x debounced=300ms throttled=100ms> = ""` fires E-REACTIVITY-ATTR-CONFLICT. Asserted AS an error. Incidental E-DG-002 / W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset.
rationale: §6.13.6: `debounced=` AND `throttled=` on the same state-decl SHALL fire E-REACTIVITY-ATTR-CONFLICT — the two attributes describe competing timing rules; a cell picks one.
